column1: Chandler Simpson sits atop today’s Beat The Streak board, leading off for STL with a steady bat and a juicy platoon advantage against Michael McGreevy. Simpson’s top-of-the-order role and a strong 73.8% hit probability make him a rock-solid pick, especially in a park that’s playing slightly hitter-friendly. Right behind him, Maikel Garcia also claims the leadoff spot for ATL and brings a reliable profile into a matchup with Reynaldo Lopez—expect plenty of at-bats and a great chance to get on base early. Bobby Witt Jr. and Vinnie Pasquantino round out the list with favorable lineup slots and consistent trends, but Simpson’s combination of matchup and opportunity is tough to top.
